genre_refs: WWII-era / WPA recruitment poster art; mid-century pulp illustration
description: AI-generated illustration in the style of a vintage 1940s-50s poster. It shows a square-jawed young white man with combed brown hair, wearing a light short-sleeve work shirt, looking toward the viewer. Behind him, against a pale cloud-streaked sky, are a rusted pickaxe on the left and the yellow arm of an excavator or oil-pump machinery on the right. The image has a muted, aged color palette with painterly shading and a faint cream border. Across the lower portion, in large white serif (italic 'Power the' over bold 'GOLDEN AGE!'), reads the text 'Power the GOLDEN AGE!'. A small circular DOL seal sits in the bottom-right corner.
